review_text:
This was my first facial, I was excited for it and had all of these expectations. Danielle went above and beyond and surpassed all my expectations. She is AMAZING! Very professional, super personable, very knowledgeable, she talked me through everything and made sure I was comfortable. It was very relaxing and I’m also a talker so I loved how she listened to me talk and made conversation with me. I would definitely go back and get my facial with Danielle.

I was also serviced by Emily for intimate lightening and Co2 laser. Okay, she definitely knows what she is doing. She listened to all of my concerns, was very accommodating, professional, explained to me the procedure and the aftercare instructions. She took her time and always asked me if I was doing okay and made sure I was as comfortable as can be for the procedure. If ever I have any questions, I love that I can call and Emily speaks to me and answers any questions I may have. This attention to detail is what keeps me coming back.

Thank you all for a pleasant experience!
Marla is the best ❤️
Marla Schenck and Onna Cabrera are fantastic to work with.  They are so helpful, responsive and professional.  Thank you so much!

I had such an amazing experience at Arviv Medical Aesthetics Tampa from start to finish. The entire team was incredibly welcoming, professional, and genuinely attentive to my goals. You can tell they truly care about their clients and take the time to explain everything in a way that makes you feel comfortable and confident.
The space itself is clean, modern, and relaxing it immediately puts you at ease. My provider was extremely knowledgeable and precise, and I never felt rushed or pressured. They customized everything to what would look best for me, which I really appreciated.
Most importantly, the results are beautiful natural, refreshed, and exactly what I was hoping for. I left feeling more confident and already looking forward to my next visit.
If you’re considering any aesthetic treatments, I can’t recommend them enough. Truly top-tier service and results!

I got laser hair removal here about 3 years ago or so. It’s been the best decision I’ve ever made. I haven’t had to think about shaving or waxing in forever and I wish I could’ve told my 18 year old self about it. I feel like a beautiful hairless cat. No more razor bumps or ingrown hairs. Honestly the cost seems high but if you think of the time and money you’re saving from traditional razors and stuff, it’s so worth it.

I had Diana as my person. She walked me through everything, was super professional and made me feel very comfortable from start to finish. She’s really got a way of making you feel calm and the entire experience was phenomenal.

I bought a package years ago, so I’m not sure what prices are like now. I still would’ve paid a pretty penny to not feel razor burn or any sort of pain from waxing. If you’re someone with dark hair and thus, dark armpits despite shaving, this helped tremendously.

The location had plenty of parking, the staff were very nice, and the place was really clean. I’ve already recommended Arviv to a few friends.
Excellent service and attention

I went to see the doctor for a consult on a service I thought would help me with an issue I’m having. She was very upfront about the fact that she didn’t think it would resolve , or at least get much benefit to the area of concern but was willing to treat it and add other areas in the deal . I realized that it just wasn’t a good fit for what I was hoping for . I’m  thankful she was so transparent about expectations. She also was able to have the surgeon speak to me about another option I had not seriously considered snd that was awesome .  I did end up going ahead and having my microbladed brows lasered ( tattoo removal) because I want to treat them differently. I will absolutely return to this business for the many services they offer . It was a great professional environment.

Great service from Marla, she does my pellets, botox and fillers. She makes sure she gives you exactly what you what.
Danielle is fabulous for facials and micro needling . I see a difference in my skin since starting my series of 3.
I strongly recommend Arivi for all your health and beauty needs.
The plastic surgeons are talented as well!
Stopped in for the fist time to get Botox for my migraines. Emilie was amazing!

Danielle is absolutely fantastic! She’s professional, knowledgeable, and always makes the experience comfortable and easy. You can tell she really cares about her clients and takes pride in her work. I’ve had consistently great experiences with her and would highly recommend her to anyone looking for top-quality service!
I have seen Marla, Emilie and Anastasia at this clinic.  They are excellent! Highly recommend!

I had a wart on my cheek since I was 12/13. I was very insecure about it. My parents didn’t see a need to get it removed because it was “non threatening”. However, I’m getting married  in a few weeks, and just didn’t want it there anymore. Marla and her crew took the best care of me. It was quick and painless. I feel confident and ready to take on the day. She also prescribed me something to help with my immune system.

Another great experience at Arviv today!
I had my Deluxe facial today with Diana and she was amazing. I left with my face hydrated, moisturized and glowing!
Shout out to the entire office for always being so kind and making me feel so comfortable.
Thank you Diana!!!
I was nervous but Marla was amazing! I’m still healing but loving my results so far!
excellent specialists, they really know what you need exactly for you!

Arviv has the real FSW therapy equipment recommended by my urologist (Storz Duolith SD1), not the ordinary SW (Gainswave) offered by many clinics. Emilee the technician was great. I’ve had great results.
danielle is so great!

Danielle is my go-to for laser hair removal! She’s super knowledgeable and proficient in her job, and a wonderful person to talk to while you’re getting your procedures done. Will keep going here for all my beauty needs! ♥️ Thank you, Danielle!
Nadina is absolutely wonderful along with the rest of the staff. So kind, professional, and knowledgeable. In love with my results so far
Emelie is really a nice person she cares alot

I love coming to Arviv! I’ve had amazing results with every treatment I’ve had. I recently went in for eyebrow tattoo removal with Emilie, and she was fantastic. She took the time to explain everything, made sure I was comfortable throughout the appointment, and the process was much easier than I expected. You can tell she really cares about getting great results for her clients.

The whole team is always friendly, professional, and makes you feel taken care of from the moment you walk in. I’ve consistently had great experiences here and would definitely recommend Arviv to anyone considering treatments.

Marla is fantastic!
Professional yet friendly and personable.
Makes you feel comfortable even discussing uncomfortable medical information. Highly recommend!
Emilie is the best ...beautiful and beyond kind and a genius...I love her so much...She made me feel beautiful and my son proud xoxo
Great service, very professional and micro-needling procedure is a plus.  You should try it.
Dr Marla is the best. Very knowledgeable and caring
reviewer_name: Forzafit Coaching Rosa Laura Saggese Elbooz

review_text: Danielle at Arviv medical aesthetics in Tampa is truly a gem. From the moment the treatment begins, she creates such a warm, comforting environment that makes you feel completely care for. During my micro needling sessions she is always checking to make sure I am comfortable with the intensity and kindly gives me little breaks when I need them. What touches me the most is how attentive she is. She remembers my concerns, my progress, and even the personal stories that I share. It is clear that she genuinely cares about her patients and wants the best results for them. She even makes sure I know about the best deals available. I am so grateful to be in her care and highly recommend her.
Marla is the only person I allow to do my injections. Shes easy, thorough, comforting, gentle and patient with me! She’s very knowledgeable in what she does. The people need and love you Marla 🥰🥰

This is the best Aesthetic Spa in the area.
I have been going for years & my life has improved drastically, physically & mentally due to treatments I have received.
Staff is great & friendly, nurse practitioner Marla is detail oriented & very helpful. Doctor Arviv is charming & great at explaining the procedure & what needs to be done.

Emilie is fantastic - I’ve been getting Botox from one of the “it” places in South Tampa, but decided to try something a little closer to home. I think the results with Emilie are
the best I’ve ever gotten

Marla is amazing! She is incredibly kind, patient, and truly excellent at what she does. I have been doing my pellets with her for the past 5 years, and I couldn’t be happier with the care and professionalism she provides. I wouldn’t change her for anyone!

Marla is my go to I absolutely love her. I was referred to the owner Tali by a client of mine and she wasnt available so I was talked into Marla & decided to take a chance and here I am years later still a client of hers ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Emily was great and provided great services and inside as to assist with my needs.

Diana is extremely detailed oriented and professional which is essential in her role.  She also knows how to perform treatment in a manner that is reduces any agitation associated with last removal.  She keeps people at ease.  I specifically request Diana for any service

Nadina was truly amazing during my coolsculpting treatments! From the very beginning, she was warm, professional, and incredibly attentive. She made me feel completely comfortable and confident throughout the entire process. She consistently checked in to make sure I was happy with everything and took her time to ensure the best experience possible. Her attention to detail and caring personality really stood out. I couldn’t have asked for a better specialist! I highly, highly recommend Nadina to anyone looking for exceptional care and results 🙏🏽💗

Emilie was amazing. We did a session of eyebrow tattoo removal with picoway laser. Didn’t hurt at all. She also convinced me to get daxify for my forehead which was super affordable and I loved the results. Highly recommend!
I love coming and seeing Danielle for my facials. I always leave so refreshed and glowing. Definitely recommend Danielle for your facial and /or other treatments.
Marla is amazing and the staff is really super friendly.  Very professional environment.  I would definitely refer Arviv Medical to my friends.

This was my third Microneedling session with Danielle but I have done other services with her.  She is so kind and professional and explains everything and makes sure you are comfortable.  I have had amazing results and face feels so great.  She clearly explained the post care and looking forward to doing more services with her.  In general I have been going to Arviv for 15+ years and I have always had a great experience.

I love this place. I see Marla for my migraines and hormone treatments. She is easy to talk to about anything. I’m never embarrassed to ask Marla any questions. The staff is always friendly. In addition, this office is the most efficient place I know. I don’t mind spending a little more for efficiency and Competency.
I see Diana for several types of treatments including hydrofacials and microneedling. She is excellent, detailed, and thorough. I highly recommend her.

I highly recommend Arviv medical aesthetics. I’ve gotten Botox and filler  from Dr. Arviv, and Marla, a breast augmentation by Dr. Markelov in their surgery center. And now a facial with Danielle at their skin spa.. all the procedures were amazing. Not only are they so professional and clean, they also make you feel comfortable every step of the way. Honestly I can’t say enough good things about my experiences with them, I will be a client for life!

Diana has been doing my microneedling for a few months now helping my face go from rough to smooth , she is so sweet , answers any questions I have always (and I come with a lot) , and makes sure I’m completely comfortable each session. Anytime I’ve spoken with anyone else in the office they are also kind and helpful!

Emilie was fantastic. She did my Ultherapy for jowls and neck. She was very gentle and walked me through the entire procedure. I will be returning for other treatments. Great staff. I highly recommend =))

Marla is the most amazing person, she is a down to earth, intelligent, honest, and professional. Her team is great as well, like any place you will always find one or two with a little attitude but everyone has bad  days. I definitely recommend them.
I loved the experience. I got great result for my eyebrows tattoo removal. Staff was knowledgeable and caring. Thank you
